context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 117 verified all signup/login copy changes and P0 critical signup flow. The signup flow now: (1) POST /api/auth/signup, (2) POST /api/auth/login, (3) POST /api/auth/onboarding with primaryIndustry, (4) navigate to /dashboard. This bypasses the /onboarding page for email signups. Google OAuth users still go through /onboarding (IndustryOnboarding component).
